verse.name: v1
verse.lines: When I became a Christian, everything seemed fine I was happy as could be But all my old friends said," you're out of your mind, girl Now you're no longer free". I never could understand their rage It's not like I'm a bird in a cage Liberty came to me that day So, this is all I have to say:

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Well, it's true I can do whatever I want, But my want's been rearranged Jesus came in, saved from sin, and there's bee a huge change Well, I used to want all the world could give, But I've chosen not to die but to live Well, it's true I can do whatever I want, But my want's been changed.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Now, everyday, I'm walkin' and I'm talkin' with Him He's a precious friend to me Never more to want, yeah, I'm filled to the brim with contentment eternally So, if you've been searchin', Here's some advice: I've truly found there's none good but Christ Freedom will come to you that day And this is all you'll have to say:
